title: Squirrel Removal Upper West Side | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Upper West Side, where they frequently invade brownstone attics, pre-war apartment buildings, and rooftop spaces near Riverside and Central Parks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout the Upper West Side, from Columbus Avenue to Riverside Drive. Our humane removal methods protect both your property and Manhattan's urban wildlife.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Upper West Side squirrel problems with over 15 years of experience working in Manhattan's historic buildings and modern high-rises. Our licensed technicians understand the unique architectural challenges of the neighborhood and provide discreet, effective solutions tailored to your property's needs.
localContext: Upper West Side's tree-lined streets and proximity to Central Park and Riverside Park create an ideal environment for squirrel populations that often seek shelter in the area's classic brownstones, co-ops, and apartment buildings. The neighborhood's mix of historic architecture and older building stock provides numerous entry points through roof lines, vents, and aging exterior walls that require professional wildlife exclusion services.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Upper West Side typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required repairs. Factors include building height, attic accessibility, and whether cleanup or insulation replacement is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Upper West Side properties.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Upper West Side buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Upper West Side due to the abundance of mature trees along residential streets and the neighborhood's proximity to Central Park and Riverside Park. They frequently enter attics, roof spaces, and wall voids of brownstones and pre-war buildings, especially during fall and winter when seeking warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Upper West Side property?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Upper West Side are completed within 3-7 days, though timeline varies based on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We typically conduct an initial inspection within 24 hours, set humane traps immediately, and perform exclusion work once all animals are removed. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.

faqs.question: Do you repair squirrel damage to Upper West Side buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete squirrel damage repair services for Upper West Side properties, including sealing entry points, replacing damaged insulation, repairing chewed wiring, and restoring soffits, fascia, and roof vents. Our team is experienced working with the historic building materials and architectural standards common in Upper West Side brownstones and classic apartment buildings.
